ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the market data entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., MASK/USDT) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the market data is sourced from */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe of the market data (e.g., 1m, 5m, 1h) */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous period */,
  "volume_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in volume from the previous period */,
  "trading_pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trading pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_trading_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("trading_pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., MASK/USDT) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper" TEXT /* URL to the cryptocurrency's whitepaper */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user's team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the market data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_pairs" (
  "trading_pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the trading pair */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the trading pair */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
